name: Example Crypto Challenge
description: Decrypt the following message: 'pm ol ohk hufaopun jvumpkluaphs av zhf, ol dyval pa pu jpwoly, aoha pz, if zv johunpun aol vykly vm aol slaalyz vm aol hswohila, aoha uva h dvyk jvbsk il thkl vba.'. It seems to be encrypted with a simple cipher.
hints: This is a classic substitution cipher
